formulas.name: Accessible Emission Limit Calculation

components.AEL: Accessible Emission Limit - maximum permitted emission level
components.comparison: Product classified based on AE/AEL ratio

calculation_steps: Calculate AEL based on wavelength and exposure duration
Determine class based on most restrictive ratio

ratio_interpretation.ratio_less_than_1: AE < AEL, product meets class requirements
ratio_interpretation.ratio_greater_than_1: AE > AEL, product exceeds class requirements
ratio_interpretation.critical_grouping: Find grouping that maximizes AE/AEL ratio

formulas.name: Angular Subtense Calculation
formulas.definition: α = (αx + αy) / 2 - arithmetic mean of angular dimensions

parameters.result: Average angular subtense used for extended source evaluation

special_rules.for_C6_determination: α limited to αmax(t) for same duration t as AEL
special_rules.for_C5_criteria: α NOT limited by αmax for 'Unless α > 100 mrad' criterion

formulas.name: T2 Time Constant Calculation
formulas.formula: T2 = 10 × 10^((α - 1.5)/98.5) seconds, for αmin ≤ α ≤ αmax

parameters.result: Time beyond which extended-source MPE becomes constant irradiance

formulas.name: C5 Pulse Repetition Correction Factor
formulas.description: Reduces AEL for repetitive pulse trains to account for thermal additivity

parameters.N: Number of pulses within T2 or time base, whichever is shorter

application_rules: N counts pulses within evaluation duration
For pulse groups, N = number of groups
Does not apply when α > 100 mrad (unless criterion)
Thermal additivity basis: heat accumulation from multiple pulses

formulas.name: C6 Extended Source Correction Factor
formulas.description: Adjusts AEL for extended sources based on angular subtense
formulas.note: C6 limited by αmax(t) for determination, but not for C5 criteria

formulas.name: Optical Density Calculation
formulas.eyewear_selection: Required OD = log10(E/MPE) where E is expected exposure

formulas.name: Beam Divergence
formulas.definition: Angle containing 1 - 1/e (63.2%) of total radiant energy
formulas.measurement: Measure beam diameter at two distances, calculate angular spread

formulas.name: Solid Angle Calculations
formulas.for_small_angles: Ω ≈ π × (φ/2)² where φ is full-angle divergence
